fleet.title: Fleet Management
fleet.subtitle: Manage your registered fleet vehicles
fleet.searchPlaceholder: Search by registration number, make, model…
fleet.deleteDesc: Vehicle {{reg}} ({{make}} {{model}}) will be permanently removed from the fleet.
fleet.activeWarning: This bus is currently {{status}}. Deleting it will unassign it from its active route.
fleet.busIdNote: Bus ID is generated automatically from the registration number.
fleet.insuranceDesc: A vehicle shows Available = Yes only when its status is ACTIVE and a valid (non-expired) insurance document is on file.

drivers.title: Drivers
drivers.subtitle: Manage all registered bus drivers
drivers.employeeIdAuto: Employee ID is generated automatically (DRV-0001, DRV-0002 …)
drivers.medicalConditionsPlaceholder: List any known medical conditions, allergies, or medications…
drivers.deleteConfirm: You are about to permanently remove {{name}} ({{id}}) from the system.

conductors.title: Collectors
conductors.subtitle: Manage all registered bus ticket collectors
conductors.deleteConfirm: You are about to permanently remove {{name}} ({{id}}) from the system.

routes.title: Routes
routes.subtitle: Draw and manage transit routes on the map
routes.searchPlaceholder: Search by route code or name...
routes.stopsDetached: This route has {{count}} stop(s) assigned. They will be detached.
routes.mapInstruction: Click on the map to add route waypoints
routes.clickToStart: Click on the map to start drawing the route
routes.minPoints: Add at least 2 points to draw a route

stops.title: Bus Stops
stops.subtitle: Stops organised by route in sequential order
stops.searchPlaceholder: Search by stop name, route code...
stops.chooseRoute: — Choose a route to add stops —
stops.clickMapHint: Click anywhere on the map to place a new bus stop
stops.routePathOnMap: The route path will appear on the map
stops.clickMapForStop: Click map to place a stop
stops.fillStopDetails: Then fill in the stop details here
stops.mapShowsRoute: The map will show the route path
stops.justAdded: Just added — use the × in the list to remove
stops.routesAffected: This stop is used by {{count}} route(s) — removing it may affect those routes.
stops.noStopsFound: No stops found. Add stops via "Add Stop".
stops.noStopOrRoute: No stop placed or route selected

dispatch.title: Dispatcher Control Center
dispatch.subtitle: active allocations

form.selectedCount: Select Buses for This Route ({{count}} selected)

dispatch.noAvailableBuses: No available buses — all fleet is already allocated today.
dispatch.getStarted: Use 'Generate Schedule' or 'Assign Bus' to get started.
dispatch.removeDesc: Remove {{bus}} from {{route}}? The bus will be marked as available.
dispatch.deleteDesc: {{bus}} will be unassigned from route {{route}} and marked as available.

scheduling.title: Scheduling
scheduling.maxHoursWarning: Drivers cannot work more than 8 hours per day (Nepal Labour Act 2074)
scheduling.autoScheduleDesc: Automatically generate trips from timetable slots. Max 8 hours/day per driver enforced (Nepal Labour Act 2074).

ticketing.title: Ticketing
ticketing.subtitle: Issue and manage bus tickets
ticketing.priceMin: Price must be at least NPR 1
ticketing.posNote: This ticket will be tagged as POS Machine issued. Tickets from the mobile app are tagged automatically.
ticketing.noPermission: You do not have permission to issue tickets
ticketing.ticketNotFound: Ticket not found or already used

accounting.title: Accounting
accounting.subtitle: Double-entry · Chart of Accounts · Financial Reports

overview.autoMappingDesc: Every operational event triggers a balanced double-entry automatically

reports.setDateRange: Set your date range and click Generate Report

salaryModal.title: Add Salary Payment
salaryModal.subtitle: Auto-generates journal entry when paid
salaryModal.validEmployeeDropdown: Select an employee from the dropdown
salaryModal.validPeriodOrder: Period From must be before Period To

je.emptyDesc: Entries are auto-generated from ticket sales, fuel & maintenance — or create manually.

salary.emptyDesc: Add salary payments to auto-generate journal entries.

coa.emptyDesc: Run seed_coa to initialise root accounts.
coa.selectAccountHint: Click any account in the tree to view details, or use "+" to create a new one.
coa.systemWarning: This is a system-defined account. It cannot be deleted, but you can add child accounts under it.

toast.deleteGroupError: Cannot delete an account with child accounts
toast.deleteConfirm: Delete account "{{code}} — {{name}}"? This cannot be undone.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.loadError: Could not load analytics data. The server may be unavailable. Retrying automatically…

settings.subtitle: Company profile and platform configuration
settings.logoUploaded: Logo uploaded. Click the image to change.
settings.logoUploadPrompt: Upload your company logo. It will appear in the sidebar.
settings.logoHint: PNG, JPG or SVG · max 2 MB

roles.title: Roles & Permissions
roles.subtitle: Manage roles and access control for your organization
roles.deleteDesc: {{name}} will be permanently deleted. Users assigned this role will lose it.
roles.selectRolePrompt: Select a role to manage permissions
roles.selectRoleHint: Choose a role from the list on the left to view and edit its permissions.

audit.noLogsDesc: Changes to roles and permissions will appear here

descriptions.dispatch.view: View live tracking and dispatch board
descriptions.dispatch.add: Dispatch and assign buses to routes
